title: DESIGN.md Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a design.md scaffold per ADR-022 (alias-preserved 5-layer token contract). Reference: apps/design/src/data/designs/anthropic/design.md (gold standard, 256 values). Schema versioning is git-tracked; the file name carries no version suffix.

version.description: Schema version. v2.2 is the current canonical.

name.description: Brand or design system display name.

description.description: One-line summary of the visual atmosphere.

defaultMode.description: Which mode the brand renders by default. Falls back to 'light' if unspecified.

supportsDark.description: True when the brand ships dedicated dark-mode tokens. Required for dark: block to be consumed by renderers.

archetype.description: Free-form archetype label (e.g. 'Warm Editorial · Slate-on-Ivory'). Editorial choice.

chips.description: Short bullets surfaced in gallery cards. Editorial.

consumer_contract.description: Hard-coded pipeline policy (priority_order, mode_rule, etc.) per ADR-022 — not extracted from CSS.

colors.description: Layer 1 (shadcn slots) + Layer 5 (brand primitives) + Layer 4 aliases. Values are literal hex/rgb/hsl strings.

dark.description: Layer 1 shadcn slots in dark mode. Mostly colors, but may include dark-mode-specific shadow / elevation overrides (handcrafted Anthropic ships dark.elevation-* keys with box-shadow strings). Schema accepts any string here.

fonts.description: Font family slots (sans, serif, mono, display). Each value is a CSS font-family stack.

typography.description: Typography roles (display, heading, body, caption, etc.) with fontFamily + fontSize + lineHeight + fontWeight + letterSpacing.

spacing.description: Layer 3 Tailwind base spacing scale. Numeric stops or t-shirt aliases (xs, sm, md, lg, xl). Values may be bare lengths (12px / 1rem) or composite expressions (calc / max / min / clamp).

rounded.description: Border-radius scale. Numeric or named (none, sm, md, lg, xl, full, button, card, input).

shadows.description: Box-shadow scale. Filtered to elevation shadows (no focus rings, no all-transparent).

shadows_inset.description: Inset shadows used as hairline borders (Linear/Anthropic pattern). Optional — emitted only when distinct from elevation shadows.

motion.description: Layer 2 Fluentui canonical scale. 8 durations + 7 easings + role aliases.

elevation.description: M3-style elevation tiers (flat, raised, floating, overlay, modal). Each value is a box-shadow string.

components.description: Component recipes (button-primary, card, input-text, badge, nav-header, etc.). Layer 1 contract.

pattern_tokens.description: Cross-component pattern tokens such as motion, focus, elevation, and z-index scale. Values must be extracted/aliased evidence or explicit extraction gaps.

preview_tokens.description: Convenience tokens for renderer preview surfaces (surface_bg, surface_fg, etc.).

brand_primitives.description: Layer 5 brand-specific primitives (case-eyebrow, motion-press, hairline-color, etc.). No shadcn equivalent — editorial.

aliases.description: Layer 4 deprecated aliases mapped to canonical Layer 1/2/3 targets. 18 invariant + 23 role-coupled per ADR-022 v2.

assets.description: Brand identity assets extracted from the source page: logo (svg-inline or URL), favicon, og-image, apple-touch-icon, theme-color, manifest URL. Optional — emitted only when extraction yielded any signal.

showcase.description: Hero block + voice signals consumed by the gallery card renderer.

colorValue.description: Literal CSS color: #hex, rgb(), hsl(), var(--token), or a CSS keyword.
